posts.author: KaylaG123 (Kayla Germaniuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Unable to delete assets once loaded while editing a virtual event in Monday Sales CRM

What are you trying to achieve

During the creative process, you don’t always know what is going to work best when setting up the virtual event. By the time you get it organized there are images that no longer are applicable to the event. Would be nice having a delete function
